caption: A man is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a black t-shirt that reads "CHECK IT! MAN," a black baseball cap with a logo, and large over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone and gestures with his right hand while resting his chin on his left hand. In the background, a white wall features a repeating pattern of stars and the word "HUSTLE," alongside a large red and black logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101." A smaller logo on the left side of the screen reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his head and gaze, moving from looking slightly to his right to looking more directly toward the camera. His facial expression remains serious and focused as he continues to speak and gesture throughout the clip.
